info.title: Lazy Fantasy
info.description: Backend API for Lazy Fantasy — Cricket predictions

post.description:
Register a new user.

- **username**: Unique username
- **email**: Valid email address
- **password**: Password (will be hashed)

Login and get JWT access token.

Uses OAuth2 password flow - send username and password as form data.

Authenticate with Google SSO.

Verifies the Google ID token, finds or creates the user, and returns a JWT.

get.description: Get current user's profile.

post.description:
Create a new league.

The current user becomes the owner and is automatically added as a member.
A unique 6-character invite code is generated.

get.description:
Public endpoint — returns basic league info for an invite code.
No auth required so the join page can show the league name before login.

post.description: Join a league using an invite code.

get.description: Get all leagues the current user is a member of.

schema.title: Response Get My Leagues Leagues My Get

get.description:
Get the leaderboard for a specific league.

Only members of the league can view the leaderboard.

Get all league members' predictions for a locked match.
Only accessible after the match's prediction window has closed (start_time has passed).

schema.title: Response Get League Match Predictions Leagues  League Id  Matches  Match Id  Predictions Get

get.description:
The Match Verdict for a (league, match) pair — used as the page hero on
/leagues/[id]/match/[id]. Returns 404 if the match isn't completed/scored
or no league member predicted it.

List matches.

By default returns only upcoming (scheduled) matches.
Use `include_completed=true` to include completed matches.
Optionally filter by `tournament_id`.
Get detailed match info including results for completed matches.

Get all players from both teams in a match.

Used for populating dropdowns in the prediction form.

post.description:
Submit a prediction for a match.

Predictions can only be submitted before the match starts (UTC).
If a prediction already exists for this match, it will be updated.

**Scoring:**
- Winner: +10 pts
- Most Runs (Team 1): +20 pts
- Most Runs (Team 2): +20 pts
- Most Wickets (Team 1): +20 pts
- Most Wickets (Team 2): +20 pts
- Player of Match: +50 pts
- Max total: 140 pts

get.description: Get all predictions made by the current user (raw IDs).

schema.title: Response Get My Predictions Predictions My Get

get.description: Get all predictions with match context, player names, and actual results.

schema.title: Response Get My Predictions Detailed Predictions My Detailed Get

post.description:
Create a new match (Admin only).

Requires admin privileges to create matches.

Set match results and trigger score calculation (Admin only).

This endpoint:
1. Updates the match with results
2. Sets match status to COMPLETED
3. Triggers automatic score calculation for all predictions

Note: In a production app, this should be restricted to admin users.

get.description: List all matches with their status (Admin only).
Get all predictions for a specific match (Admin only).
Get full squad for both teams in a match (Admin only). Ignores lineup filtering.
Get current lineup for a match (Admin only).

post.description:
Set playing XI for a match (Admin only).

Accepts 22 player IDs (11 per team). Validates all players belong to
one of the two match teams and that exactly 11 are selected per team.

get.description:
Return player IDs from the most recent prior lineup for each team in this match.
Used to pre-fill the lineup form so admins only need to make small adjustments.

post.description: Link a match to a CricAPI external_match_id and validate the ID.

delete.description: Remove CricAPI link from a match and reset sync state.

get.description: Get current CricAPI sync state + live preview for a match.

post.description: Force an immediate sync cycle for a specific match.

get.description: Show resolved and unresolved CricAPI player name mappings for a match.

post.description: Save cricapi_player_id on Player records (one-time bootstrap per season).

get.description: List CricAPI matches in a series (for finding the right external_match_id).

patch.description: Set the tournament picks window state (Admin only).

post.description: Set tournament Top 4 + player results and trigger picks scoring (Admin only).

get.description: Return the VAPID public key for the frontend to use when subscribing.

post.description: Save a push subscription for the current user.

get.description: List all tournaments.
Get the current user's tournament picks and window state.

post.description: Submit or update tournament picks (only when window is open or open2).

get.description: List all teams participating in the tournament.

schema.title: Response List Teams Tournaments  Tournament Id  Teams Get

get.description: List all players in the tournament for pick dropdowns.

schema.title: Response List Players Tournaments  Tournament Id  Players Get

get.description: Health check endpoint.
Health check endpoint.
